loop1.title: Real Time Monitoring (Feeder Heatmap)
loop1.note: Showing active power (kW) as a proxy for current, voltage, and unbalance metrics — per-phase current and voltage aren't measured for this asset.

loop1.title: Quick Stats
loop1.note: Showing Voltage and Power Factor directly; Current Unbalance is derived from phase currents (neutral current calculation). Note: 'Electrical load' label is retained from default config but bound to Power Factor metric as per recipe.
